title: Flight Rings
description: Two flight rings which grant creative flight
body:
Adds two different flight rings which grant creative flight with many config options and features. Can be enchanted with books and an anvil or an enchanting table. ⠀

Basic Flight Ring:

* Cheaper * Severe hunger penalty * Not ideal for long-distance travel * Config options include: durability, penalty type and cost Recipe: ![Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/sXdtDaB.png) ⠀

Pure Flight Ring

* More expensive * Light XP penalty * Infinite durability * Config options include: durability, penalty type and cost Recipe: ![Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/0EddXAT.png)
